name: Full Inventory PY
expression: CALCULATE([Total Full Inventory], FILTER(ALL(DimDate), DimDate[Year] = MAX(DimDate[Year]) - 1 && DimDate[MonthNum] = MAX(DimDate[MonthNum])))

name: DC Inventory PY
expression: CALCULATE([Total DC Inventory], FILTER(ALL(DimDate), DimDate[Year] = MAX(DimDate[Year]) - 1 && DimDate[MonthNum] = MAX(DimDate[MonthNum])))

name: DC Inventory PY (Plts)
expression: CALCULATE([Total DC Inventory (Plts)], FILTER(ALL(DimDate), DimDate[Year] = MAX(DimDate[Year]) - 1 && DimDate[MonthNum] = MAX(DimDate[MonthNum])))

name: Billings Rolling 12 MoM % (Plts)
expression: DIVIDE(([Billings Rolling 12 (Plts)]-[Billings Rolling 12 Prior Month (Plts)]),[Billings Rolling 12 Prior Month (Plts)])

name: Billings Rolling 12 MoM %
expression: DIVIDE(([Billings Rolling 12]-[Billings Rolling 12 Prior Month]),[Billings Rolling 12 Prior Month])

name: Depletions Rolling 12 MoM %
expression: DIVIDE(([Depletions Rolling 12]-[Depletions Rolling 12 Prior Month]),[Depletions Rolling 12 Prior Month])

name: Depletions Rolling 12 MoM % (Plts)
expression: DIVIDE(([Depletions Rolling 12 (Plts)]-[Depletions Rolling 12 Prior Month (Plts)]),[Depletions Rolling 12 Prior Month (Plts)])
